description: A rustic wooden bed frame with intricately carved headboards that resemble stylized birds or animal heads. The bed is dressed with a green sheet and a textured, dark gray blanket or comforter, neatly folded at the foot. The wood appears to be aged and weathered, suggesting a traditional or fantasy-inspired aesthetic. The construction features visible joinery and rough-hewn planks, adding to its handcrafted and durable appearance. The overall design evokes a sense of natural beauty and sturdy craftsmanship.
